Home › Auction Software › Lowest Unique Bid › Rubids

Rubids Multi Type auction

Industry
Lowest Unique Bid Auction
Client Location
United States
Project Duration
6 months
Team Size
3 members
Technologies
CodeIgniter MVC framework, our application leverages PHP, MySQL

Project Overview

Rubids is the world's fastest, most entertaining marketplace, with live online auctions every day in a wide variety of categories. Rubids is available on the iPhone and iPad via the App Store and on Android via Google Play. Rubids offers coupons, auctions, and games that you can enjoy. Not only that, you can share the earnings with it.

Rubids is combination of all possible auction software in one single software that includes...

Visit Website

Our Features

1.

Enable/Disable seller feature and Rubids shop for shopping

2.

Games to earn points

3.

Coupons and stores for discounts and cashback

4.

Real-time biddings and interesting auctions

5.

Upcoming events details and Travel destinations and bookings

6.

Newsletter

7.

Social media signup/login

8.

Social media sharing

9.

Live chat/help
